seedanceSegments.title: Hook praline
seedanceSegments.description: Caramel pour, brittle crack, blender, smooth praline ribbon.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead countertop actions. Use @KitchenIslandDefault to preserve kitchen identity if the shot becomes wider. Use @BakingMat, @SaucepanLarge, @RollingPin, @Blender and @Spoon only as object references. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown to preserve character hands. Generate exactly 8 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.7s amber caramel pours; 0.7-1.2s glossy puddle spreads; 1.2-1.7s caramel is hardened glass, rolling pin raised; 1.7-2.1s one vertical hit, no rolling; 2.1-2.6s brittle angular shards; 2.6-3.5s shards and hazelnuts in blender; 3.5-4.2s quick vortex; 4.2-5.0s smooth praline ribbon on spoon. Global negatives: no rolling pin handles, no spreading gesture, no grainy paste on mat, no text.
seedanceSegments.promptInitial: Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead countertop actions. Use @KitchenIslandDefault to preserve kitchen identity if the shot becomes wider. seedanceSegments.risk: Rolling pin can be misread as spreading. Lock vertical mallet hit.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: hot caramel pour; brittle crack; blender; sticky praline ribbon

seedanceSegments.title: Bake and reveal choux crown
seedanceSegments.description: Oven insertion, hard cut from raw crown to baked crown, golden cracked reveal.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @OvenWide for the already-open oven context. Use @OvenCloseup for the baked reveal. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only for kitchen identity. Use @RawChouxCrownFrame only for the raw separate piped choux domes touching in a ring. Use @BakedChouxCrownFrame only as the target baked topology: puffed golden separate domes, cracked crumble, not a smooth ring. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s tray slides into already-open oven; 1.0-2.0s raw crown reference visible; 2.0-2.3s hard cut; 2.3-4.0s baked crown reference topology appears; 4.0-6.0s steam and crisp cracked crumble close-up. Global negatives: no smooth donut ring, no invented base disc, no melting choux, no oven door manipulation.
seedanceSegments.promptInitial: Use @OvenWide for the already-open oven context. Use @OvenCloseup for the baked reveal. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only for kitchen identity. seedanceSegments.continuity: Requires raw and baked state references created before Seedance.
seedanceSegments.risk: Seedance may smooth the Paris-Brest into a donut ring. State references are mandatory.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: tray slide; oven warmth; crisp crackle
